# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd default authorization policy for a namespace. Configure policy to handle services without explicit authorization rules. Set up default behavior for service-to-service communication. This is for our service mesh policy framework.

Prevent linkerd policy default allow.
# Category: linkerd_policy_default_allow

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: default-authorization-policy
  namespace: your-namespace
spec:
  targetRef:
    kind: Namespace
    name: your-namespace
  rules:
    - from:
        - kind: ServiceAccount
          name: '*'
      to:
        - kind: Service
          name: '*'
  defaultAllow: false
